Dharrah EHS Consultancy

Website: https://www.dharrahehs.com/
Primary region: Gujarat, India
Coverage: India
Contact phone: +91 9067605129

Summary

Dharrah EHS Consultancy is an environmental, health, and safety consultancy for industrial and infrastructure projects. The company supports regulatory approvals, environmental documentation, pollution control systems, monitoring-related work, wastewater treatment, ESG reporting, and carbon accounting.

Core proof points

- 215+ projects
- 13+ years experience
- 93% approval-focused track record
- 21 service lines

Main service groups

- Regulatory compliance and permissions
- ESG and carbon management
- Wastewater and water treatment
- Air and dust pollution control
- Environmental monitoring and laboratory support
- Specialized equipment and supplies
- Food safety support

Important services mentioned on the site

- GPCB NOC and CCA permissions
- Environment clearance and EIA report preparation
- EPR for plastic, e-waste, tyre, oil, and battery waste
- ESG sustainability reporting and BRSR support
- Carbon accounting and GHG estimation
- ETP and STP design, installation, and automation
- Air pollution control equipment and ventilation systems
- Sugar dust control technology
- Environmental monitoring and contaminated site remediation

Industries served

- Chemical and pharma
- Sugar
- Textile and dyes
- Hospitals and clinics
- Real estate and infrastructure
- Manufacturing
- Import and export
- Power and energy

What a buyer can use this company for

- Starting or expanding industrial compliance workflows
- Getting regulator-ready documentation and approvals
- Planning wastewater, STP, ETP, or pollution control systems
- Managing EPR, ESG, carbon, and environmental reporting
- Finding a consultancy that combines documentation and implementation support

Common buyer questions answered by the site

- What does Dharrah EHS do
- Which environmental approvals and registrations does Dharrah support
- Which industries does Dharrah serve
- Does Dharrah handle both compliance documentation and pollution control systems
- How quickly does Dharrah respond to new inquiries

Contact guidance

The website offers phone, WhatsApp, and inquiry form contact options. The site promise is a free first consultation and a response within 24 hours.
